desc: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: Special Summon this card, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Fiend monster from your Deck to either field.
mnst_eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: Special Summon this card, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Fiend monster from your Deck to either field.
eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: Special Summon this card, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Fiend monster from your Deck to either field.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons from your Deck to your opponent's field
